hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | grep -oE "git commit[^\"]*" | head -1); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "(^|[^a-z])(fix|hotfix|bug|revert|workaround|patch)([^a-z]|:)"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Learning-capture reminder: a fix/revert commit was just made. If the root cause was non-obvious, add a bug-track entry to docs/solutions/ so future CE runs inherit the lesson. Skip if the fix was trivial (typo, formatting, obvious oversight).\"}}"; fi' 2>/dev/null || true
